NeuroPlay

Train Your Brain, Unleash Your Potential

Discover your cognitive potential with our free online brain training games. Test your typing speed, reaction time, memory, and much more. Track your progress and challenge yourself daily.

Start PlayingLearn More
39+Games
FreeForever
No AdsDuring Games

Choose Your Challenge

Select a game to test and improve your cognitive abilities. Each game tracks your scores so you can monitor your progress over time.

Typing Test

Measure your typing speed in WPM. Test how fast and accurately you can type with our free online typing speed test. Track your progress over time.

⌨️
speed

Reaction Test

Test your visual reaction time. Click as fast as you can when the screen turns green. Compare your reaction speed with the average.

⚡
speed

Memory Test

Test your visual memory with our card matching game. Find all the matching pairs in as few moves as possible. Improve your memory skills.

🧠
memory

Number Memory

Test how many digits you can remember. Numbers get longer with each level. Challenge your short-term memory and see how far you can go.

🔢
memory

Color Test

Test your color perception skills. Match colors and identify subtle differences in hue. Find out how well you can distinguish between similar colors.

🎨
visual

Visual Memory

Test your visual memory by remembering the positions of highlighted tiles. Challenge your spatial memory and see how many levels you can complete.

👁️
memory

Sudoku

Play free Sudoku puzzles with three difficulty levels. Challenge your logical thinking and number placement skills. Perfect for brain training.

🧩
logic

Minesweeper

Play the classic Minesweeper game online. Clear the board without detonating any mines. Three difficulty levels available. Free and no download needed.

💣
logic

IQ Puzzle

Test your pattern recognition skills with IQ-style puzzles. Find the missing piece in visual matrices. Challenge your logical reasoning and abstract thinking.

🧩
logic
View All 36 Games →

Why NeuroPlay?

🧪

Scientifically Designed

Games based on cognitive science principles to effectively measure and train your brain.

📊

Track Your Progress

Your scores are saved locally. Monitor your improvement over time with detailed statistics.

🎯

Challenge Yourself

Compare your performance against your own best scores. Beat your personal records!

🌐

Play Anywhere

All games work in your browser. No downloads, no accounts. Just play on any device.
